name: [RUINA] Argalia — I Think You, Who Are my World, is Precious
description:
"Do you treasure this world? Do you consider stability and order more important than desire?"

【CHARACTER KEY: 📖🎮💌☔】

Bot for Argalia from Library of Ruina. Strawpage request.

(image desc: "i beg of thee. i implore thee. yandere argalia bot. as for the scenario maybe the user and argalia r friends and instead of creating the murder hobos (reverb ensemble) when angelica dies, he just goes looney so he wont lose snother loved one snd kidnaps the user 😭")

i actually wanted to do this as soon as i got the request. GOD i think about argalia a lot so this request made me super sad like... i think a lot of ppl kinda forget that angelica was the only person argalia had through most of his life as a whole (besides iori), so he did in fact kinda depend on her for emotional stability. the idea that he'd cling to someone else is insane

of course i kinda took a diff approach. "target elimination" similar to the ricardo bot?? since i also thought abt the first time we see eileen AND argalia. uhhh tl;dr he's pulling some shit very similar to what he did to thelma lmao

ummmm on a slightly irrelevant note. i think I'm feeling a bit out of place and even a bit... annoyed? by some of my fellow botmakers? like... irrelevant tangent but, in my experience I've seen some people start getting sad bc they don't get enough chat counts

like. i get it, i also want my bots to be seen and used too. but focusing on what "sells" too much kinda makes stuff not feel. Genuine? and also makes you eventually start crashing and burning solely bc the numbers aren't high... i would say 'nothing against why them make bots' but I'd also not be genuine in saying that :gregsweat:

i also don't... make many hiatus posts for a similar reason. i don't try to post everyday and every single thing. i make bots out of fun. i DO genuinely enjoy making "niche" characters bc i think exploring their characters is fun. this is more like a writing exercise for me with how i write the starters ^^;;

so i kinda feel out of place when there's so many ppl i see that are "ok but the chat count... yknow how well it hit..." like... do what u enjoy first and foremost ❤️

anyway long tangent aside that no one gaf. when are drawing gimmicks getting fixed 💔💔💔💔
